name: kimi-k3-collab
description: Collaborate with persistent Kimi K3 directly from Codex through foreground or durable background MCP jobs.

interface.shortDescription: Direct foreground and background collaboration with Kimi K3.
interface.longDescription: Lets the main Codex task call persistent Kimi K3 directly for engineering, review, implementation, and visual-design work on Windows, macOS, and Linux. Foreground calls wait on pushed events; background jobs persist actions and results for explicit status, result, and cancellation requests without model-driven polling.
interface.defaultPrompt: Ask Kimi K3 directly for an independent engineering or visual-design review.
